tests.name: ControlEngine evaluate() with clean user text should return allow for innocuous user input
ControlEngine evaluate() with clean user text should emit control.audit event on evaluation
ControlEngine evaluate() with clean user text should emit policy.decision event on evaluation
ControlEngine evaluate() with text matching moderation deny pattern should return refuse for text containing a denied pattern
ControlEngine evaluate() with text matching moderation deny pattern should short-circuit and skip claims_checker after critical refuse
ControlEngine evaluate() with text matching moderation deny pattern should be case-insensitive for deny patterns
ControlEngine evaluate() with PII in text should return rewrite when a phone number is detected
ControlEngine evaluate() with PII in text should return rewrite when an email is detected
ControlEngine evaluate() with PII in text should return rewrite when an SSN is detected
ControlEngine evaluate() with PII in text should handle PII in flag-only mode without rewriting
ControlEngine evaluate() with assistant text matching disallowed claim pattern should return rewrite for text containing a disallowed pattern
ControlEngine evaluate() with assistant text matching disallowed claim pattern should return rewrite for 100% effective claim
ControlEngine evaluate() with assistant text matching disallowed claim pattern should allow exact-match approved claims for assistant text
ControlEngine evaluate() with assistant text matching disallowed claim pattern should not check claims for user text (only assistant)
ControlEngine getMetrics() should return zeroed metrics before any evaluations
ControlEngine getMetrics() should track correct counts after multiple evaluations
ControlEngine flushMetrics() should emit control.metrics event to eventBus
ControlEngine flushMetrics() should emit metrics_flushed event on local emitter
ControlEngine destroy() should flush metrics before removing listeners
ControlEngine destroy() should remove all local listeners
ControlEngine destroy() should unsubscribe from EventBus session events
ControlEngine initialize() initialize() should call claimsRegistry.initialize() when opaEvaluator present
ControlEngine OverrideController should not escalate refuse when severity < cancelThreshold
ControlEngine OverrideController should upgrade refuse to cancel_output when severity >= cancelThreshold
ControlEngine OverrideController should emit control.override when decision is upgraded
